toolSelection.reason: Mostly strong, with only two clear misses.

scoutDepth.reason: Recurring low-delta discovery pattern across a large fraction of traces.

clarification.reason: This stage rarely activates; current mean mostly reflects non-applicability rather than proven excellence under ambiguity.

planning.reason: Named-target resolution and clause-coverage defects recur with explicit validator evidence.

execution.reason: Execution weakness exists, but it mixes clean successes, incomplete repair loops, and one blocked run.

synthesis.reason: Synthesis is somewhat dragged down by shallow discovery, but it is not the main upstream bottleneck.

contextBudget.reason: Mostly strong, with one expensive memo-style outlier.

reasoningDepth.reason: Reasoning is generally adequate; its lower scores mostly follow upstream targeting failures.

mcpTransport.reason: One hard execution-context failure and several retry-without-gain traces make transport partially blocked rather than cleanly optimizable in isolation.

codeSafety.reason: Safety is acceptable overall, though repeated weak-path retries should still be watched.

synthesisBudget.reason: Budget is rarely the limiting factor.

interactionRisks.risk: When planning does not deterministically resolve named targets, execution tends to spend retries on the same weak path and completeness cannot fully recover.
Partial-clause routing and execution-context restrictions can combine into no-data or wrong-target answers that appear transport-limited even though the root cause starts earlier.
Shallow discovery leaves synthesis with correct but low-delta evidence, so downstream answer quality looks only modestly better than baseline despite successful retrieval.
